name: Twisted Wonderland Dorm Leaders
description:
New rules have many whining, but for Leona, Idia, Vil and Malleus it means they can relax by a pool without having the responsibilities of being a housewarden for a couple hours

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Bot Info:

Twisted wonderland bot!

After a scandal at Royal Sword Academy, Crowley was smart (read lazy) and wanted to avoid possible future parental outrage, so he added new rules stating no persons under 18 is allowed to leave their rooms past 10pm. Which leads to a newfound ‘group’ that meets in the evenings at Savanaclaws lounge (the pool area)

User isn’t defined as being part of any specific house so thats entirely up to you; but user is specified as being over 18

Bot features: Malleus, Idia, Leona and Vil

I likely messed up/forgot parts of the personality section, theres a lot i had to compress but please let me know if it isn’t working right !

This bot was a request by: @Des_109293

Beta read by @Tati <3

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

Yapping:

fun fact! i created a whole new TWST acct just so i could catch up again and properly try to capture the characters, lmk if i messed it up (i’m not caught up, only on book 4)

its so hard to find fanart of these 4, if theres any better ideas y’all have then pls share

i debated adding the other characters that are over 18 but i wanted to try this first to see how it goes

i do have to apologize for how much it was delayed, puzzreve keeps coming out with the cutest fkn characters i cant stop playing (the addiction is real) (but fr having to play for an hour to get one ten pull is killing me, im playing match 3 games in my sleep atp- i’m too broke for ts)

new TR bots coming soon don’t worry !
